title: Savory Tender Keto Friendly Farfalle Stir-fry
description: A post-workout Norwegian dish featuring farfalle pasta stir-fried with a savory, keto-friendly Bhuna sauce for added protein and low carbohydrates.

ingredients.name: Pepper flakes or red pepper flakes

instructions: Heat a pan over medium heat and add butter. Once melted, add onion and garlic; sauté for about 2 minutes.
Add tomato paste to the pan and stir until fragrant (about 30 seconds).
Stir in low-sodium soy sauce and pepper flakes; mix well.
Gradually incorporate cooked Farfalle pasta into the pan, tossing until fully coated. Continue cooking for another 2 minutes or until all pasta is heated through.
Add chopped spinach leaves to the stir-fry mixture and toss gently for about a minute until wilted. Remove from heat and serve.
